evals.expected_output: Reviews current branch changes against the plan. Consumes QA-REPORT.md when present, trusts QA evidence for covered criteria, carries open QA issues into the verdict, and runs multi-agent code review with confidence scores.
assertions: The plan (PLAN.md) is read and verified against
QA-REPORT.md is read when present and its status is reflected in the review
Success criteria already verified by QA are not re-tested; they are cited as QA evidence
Open QA issues are carried into the final verdict rather than re-proved or ignored
Multiple review dimensions are covered (security, correctness, performance)
Each finding includes a confidence score

evals.expected_output: Fetches the external PR via gh CLI, reviews the diff without plan verification (no local plan exists), and produces a structured code review.
assertions: The PR is fetched using gh pr view and gh pr diff
Plan verification is skipped for external PRs
The review covers the full PR diff
Findings are categorized by severity or type
Review comments are actionable and specific

evals.prompt: check my work, is this ready to ship?
evals.expected_output: Activates review from natural language, performs a QA-aware goal check plus code review, and gives a clear ship/no-ship recommendation.
assertions: The skill activates from the natural language trigger
Both QA-aware goal check and code review phases run when QA is passed or absent
A clear recommendation is provided (ship or not)
Any blockers are listed with specific file references
